revision.comment: Three brackets doesn't work; let's try two
Allow Endnote to link back to corresponding Ref
Try adding second parameter for "extra" text (eg. page number for a reference)
Revert; the 2nd parameter doesn't default to blank like I thought it would
Trying to make sure that the superscripted extlinks are not URL-expanded, not even in print
Reverted - it looks as if the trans-wiki mucks up the formatting

revision.text: [{{fullurl:{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}#endnote_{{{1}}}] See also: [[Wikipedia:Template messages/Sources of articles]]

'''This template is deprecated. Use the [[User:Cyde/Ref converter|Ref converter]] to replace it with the newer [[m:Cite/Cite.php|Cite.php]] style.'''
[{{fullurl:{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}#endnote_{{{1}}}] See also: [[Wikipedia:Template messages/Sources of articles]]

'''Using ref/note tags is not the only way to do [[Wikipedia:Footnotes|footnotes]]. Some people prefer to use [[m:Cite/Cite.php|Cite.php]]. You can use the [[User:Cyde/Ref converter|Ref converter]] to replace ref/note tags with the newer [[m:Cite/Cite.php|Cite.php]] style. If you are interested in the discussion, please see the [[Wikipedia_talk:Footnotes|Footnotes talk page]]. See also: [[Wikipedia:Template messages/Sources of articles]] [[Category:Citation templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Inline templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[sv:Mall:ref]]
